species: Here, we present a method for high-yield expression and purification of JHR complexes from two insect species, the beetle T. castaneum and the mosquito Aedes aegypti.
cell_type: The affinity-tagged T. castaneum JH receptor proteins... were coexpressed in Sf9 insect cells...
sample_source: Recombinant JHR subunits from each species were coexpressed in an insect cell line using a baculovirus system.
cell_line: The affinity-tagged T. castaneum JH receptor proteins... were coexpressed in Sf9 insect cells...
